name: provable-80-20-sbtc-pool-core
description: Week 1 scaffold for the Provable 80/20 sBTC Pool Core.

scripts.mxs:check: npm run gen:mxs && clarinet check -m Clarinet.mxs.toml -c
scripts.validate:week1: npm run gen:isqrt && npm run gen:artifacts && npm run gen:console && npm run artifacts:check && npm run clarinet:check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:differential
scripts.validate:chaos: npm run validate:week1 && npm run gen:submission-snapshot && npm run chaos:report && npm run test:chaos
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:chaos && npm run mxs:check && npm run test:mxs && npm run proof:build && npm run artifacts:check:submission
